acerca-de-mi.description: I am a 33-year-old developer with training in C++ and a solid foundation in algorithms and data structures thanks to my studies in the University Technician in Programming (UTN). I currently specialize in the .NET ecosystem (C#, Windows Forms, ASP.NET) with a focus on Backend development, layered architecture, and SQL Server databases. In addition, I have previous experience developing Full Stack web applications with React and Node.js, which allows me to have a comprehensive vision of the software life cycle. I am looking for my first professional opportunity to add value by creating robust and scalable solutions.

contacto.form-seccion: If you want to leave me a message...
contacto.name: Name
contacto.contact-description: Type here... When you press send, a confirmation window will open, click on: 'I am not a robot' to confirm sending the message.
